title: Investment Return Calculator - ROI & Growth
description: Free investment return calculator. Calculate your investment growth, ROI, and annualized returns over any time period.
keywords: investment return calculator, ROI calculator, investment growth, annualized return, portfolio return
intro: Calculate your investment returns and growth. Enter your initial investment, final value, and time period to see ROI and annualized returns.

faq.a: Return on Investment (ROI) measures the gain or loss relative to the initial investment. ROI = (Final Value - Initial Investment) / Initial Investment × 100%.
Annualized return converts total return to a yearly rate, allowing comparison of investments held for different periods.
The S&P 500 has historically returned about 10% annually before inflation. A 'good' ROI depends on risk level and investment type.
